listeners.purpose: Discover every #[AsSpan] / #[AsCounter] / #[AsHistogram] / #[AsGauge] / #[AsUpDownCounter] / #[AsContext] / #[AsBaggage] attribute across the codebase. Compile into SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry. Register each instrument with the OTel Meter.
Ensures the root span is closed + flushed even if the request short-circuited (e.g. auth failure).
Once WorkspaceResolver identifies the workspace, adds academorix.workspace_id + academorix.workspace_id to current-span attributes + baggage.
Extracts the trace context from the job payload (put there by TracePropagatingBusMiddleware on dispatch) + starts a consumer span linked to the producer.
Closes the consumer span + records success/failure status.
Records the exception on the consumer span, sets status=ERROR.

bus_middleware.purpose: On job dispatch, serialises the current trace context + baggage into the job payload. Registered globally via config('queue.middleware').
